chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 131 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.02.2016 For Katcha Peshi Mr. Masood Nabi Bachani, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Nazeer Ahmed Bhatti, Advocate for Respondent Nos.2to5 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, Standing Counsel-II. Learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied over the stance taken by respondent No.4 in para-3 of his comments whereby he has undertaken that he is ready to pay all the benefits i.e. pension, gratuity, Provident Fund etc to the legal heirs of the deceased Bacho subject to their producing necessary documents to establish their relation with the deceased. Learned counsel seeks disposal of this petition in terms of the said statement. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Karar/-
